default.text: ⟦⟦ Ñõt̃ẽ d̃ẽñs̃ĩt̃ỹ ĩs̃ h̃ĩg̃h̃,̃ l̃ẽãṽĩñg̃ l̃ĩt̃t̃l̃ẽ t̃ĩm̃ẽ b̃ẽt̃w̃ẽẽñ ĩñp̃ũt̃s̃. ⟧⟧

steady.text: ⟦⟦ T̃h̃ẽ d̃ẽñs̃ĩt̃ỹ r̃ẽm̃ãĩñs̃ c̃õñs̃ĩs̃t̃ẽñt̃,̃ r̃ẽq̃ũĩr̃ĩñg̃ c̃õñt̃ĩñũõũs̃ ãt̃t̃ẽñt̃ĩõñ. ⟧⟧

bursty.text: ⟦⟦ D̃ẽñs̃ĩt̃ỹ s̃p̃ĩk̃ẽs̃ ãp̃p̃ẽãr̃ ĩñ s̃h̃õr̃t̃ b̃ũr̃s̃t̃s̃,̃ l̃ĩm̃ĩt̃ĩñg̃ r̃ẽãc̃t̃ĩõñ t̃ĩm̃ẽ. ⟧⟧

compressed.text: ⟦⟦ Ĩñp̃ũt̃s̃ ãr̃ẽ c̃õm̃p̃r̃ẽs̃s̃ẽd̃ ĩñt̃õ t̃ĩg̃h̃t̃ w̃ĩñd̃õw̃s̃,̃ r̃ẽd̃ũc̃ĩñg̃ r̃ẽc̃õṽẽr̃ỹ m̃ãr̃g̃ĩñs̃. ⟧⟧

overload.text: ⟦⟦ H̃ĩg̃h̃ d̃ẽñs̃ĩt̃ỹ õṽẽr̃ ẽx̃t̃ẽñd̃ẽd̃ s̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñs̃ c̃ãñ q̃ũĩc̃k̃l̃ỹ b̃ũĩl̃d̃ f̃ãt̃ĩg̃ũẽ. ⟧⟧
